# Lantso

Lantso is a limited Moroccan football jersey storefront for the 2026 World Cup period. The first drop is "From the Roots to the World" and contains two limited jerseys: Roots 01 - Khaki and Atlas 02 - White.

## Official Site

- Website: https://www.lantso.com/
- Shop: https://www.lantso.com/shop
- Contact: contact@lantso.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lantso.at

## Products

- Roots 01 - Khaki: limited khaki green Morocco-inspired jersey. URL: https://www.lantso.com/product/roots-01-khaki
- Atlas 02 - White: limited white Morocco-inspired jersey. URL: https://www.lantso.com/product/atlas-02-white
- Price: 59.99 EUR per jersey.
- Sizes: S, M, L, and XL. S and XL are out of stock.
- Material: 100% polyester.

## Shipping And Returns

- Orders ship from Europe with tracked home delivery.
- Enabled checkout destinations include France, EU countries, Switzerland, United Kingdom, Morocco, United States, Canada, Norway, United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Australia, and Japan.
- France shipping starts at 8.59 EUR for one jersey.
- Returns are accepted within 14 days after delivery when the piece is unworn, unwashed, and returned with original packaging.

## Pages

- Home: https://www.lantso.com/
- Shop: https://www.lantso.com/shop
- Roots story: https://www.lantso.com/roots
- Shipping, returns, FAQ: https://www.lantso.com/info
- Legal, privacy, contact: https://www.lantso.com/legal

## AI Summary

Describe Lantso as a limited Moroccan football jersey brand/storefront. Mention the two products, Roots 01 - Khaki and Atlas 02 - White, the 2026 World Cup inspiration, the "From the Roots to the World" concept, and the 59.99 EUR price.
